title: {{explorerName}} TOML Checker
description: Check and validate {{tomlName}} for {{ledgerName}} domains with {{explorerName}}.
check-description: Enter a domain to fetch, decode, and inspect its {{tomlName}} file.
cooldown-note: There is a 10-second limit between checks.
cooldown-left: Please wait {{seconds}}s before the next check.

errors.domain-not-found: We could not reach that domain or find its TOML file. Please check the domain and try again.
errors.failed: Unable to verify the domain right now.
